orderCard.workbenchLinkedRibbon: Same order as in the workbench above

currentAssignment.title: Current orders
currentAssignment.sub: Shows current orders as returned by the server, each in its own card.

assignmentEmpty.line1: Take a short break—your next delivery is on the way.
assignmentEmpty.line2: We will show a new order as soon as it arrives.

assignmentBar.readOnly: No actions are available for this order in your current state.
assignmentBar.offerCountdown: Time left to accept or decline this offer
assignmentBar.fullDetailsHint: Tap for full details and route

orderStatusProgress.title: Delivery progress
orderStatusProgress.beforeDeliveryHint: After you accept the offer and the order becomes Accepted, the pickup and delivery path appears here step by step.
orderStatusProgress.cancelledBanner: This order is cancelled. Delivery cannot continue.

ordersHistory.minimalSub: Below: order history (server order). When there is an active offer or delivery, the action bar appears at the bottom — accept and decline from the bar, not only the card.
ordersHistory.listSectionHint: Independent cards — tap for details. The highlighted row links to the same order in “current assignment” if applicable.
ordersHistory.heroSubArchive: Delivered orders only — tap for details
ordersHistory.heroSubAvailable: Assigned orders and history — tap for details and route
ordersHistory.emptyArchiveBody: Try widening the period above, or come back after new deliveries.
ordersHistory.emptyListBody: Try changing the filters above, or come back after new activity.

earnings.title: Earnings summary
earnings.guest: Sign in to see your stats.
earnings.subServer: Delivered orders only — from the server
earnings.rangeDescAll: All your delivered orders on record
earnings.rangeDesc7d: Orders delivered in the last seven days
earnings.rangeDesc30d: Orders delivered in the last thirty days
earnings.rangeDescMonth: Orders delivered since the start of this month
earnings.emptyBody: After you complete deliveries, collection totals will appear here. Try “all periods” or change the range.
earnings.totalCollectionHint: Sum of amounts to collect from delivered orders
earnings.note: Figures are from the server for orders in “delivered” status in the selected period. They may differ from your actual balance depending on settlements.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.sub: Order updates and alerts — tap a card linked to an order for details
notifications.hintGeneral: General alert — no direct order link

openExternal.phoneNoNumberBody: The phone number is not valid to call.
openExternal.phoneCannotOpenBody: The phone app cannot be opened on this device.
openExternal.whatsappInvalidBody: A full international number is required (e.g. +970 or +972). Local numbers starting with 05 are not enough without a country code.
openExternal.whatsappFailedBody: Make sure WhatsApp is installed and the number includes a country code.

push.foregroundBodyDefault: You have a new order offer. Tap to open details.
push.permissionDeniedBody: Turn on notifications to receive new order alerts. You can enable them in system settings.

queryError.title: Could not load
queryError.fallback: Check your connection and try again.

auth.forbiddenRole: This app is for captain accounts only.
auth.forbidden: No captain profile for this account.

availability.controlSubtitle: Controls whether you appear for distribution and new offers

profile.title: My account
profile.name: Name
profile.availabilityChangeSubtitle: Same as the captain panel — updates immediately

home.title: Captain dashboard
home.sub: A quick look at your status — run orders from “Available orders”
home.hintFooter: To run orders and offers, use “Available orders”. For settings, earnings, and tracking: “Settings”.

errors.offerExpired: The time to accept this offer has ended.
errors.noPendingAssignment: No offer you can accept for this order. The offer may have expired or been reassigned. Pull to refresh.
errors.sessionPrepareFailed: Could not prepare your session. Refresh or sign in again.
errors.noActiveOffer: No active offer for this order. The offer may have expired or been reassigned. Pull to refresh.

money.hintInferred: Delivery fee was inferred from customer collection minus store amount when no separate fee was stored.
money.hintCod: Cash on delivery — use the calculator below for change.
money.hintNoCod: No separate customer collection — totals match the store amount.

prepaid.bodyExplain: Deductions are taken from delivery fees only after an order is delivered. Example: if the delivery fee is 10 ILS and commission is 15%, 1.5 ILS is deducted after delivery.
prepaid.rule1: • Deduction only after the order is delivered
prepaid.rule3: • Low balance may pause receiving new orders until top-up
prepaid.blocked: Balance is too low to receive new orders for now.
prepaid.low: Your balance is low. Please contact operations to add funds.

login.title: 2in
login.subtitle: Captain sign-in
login.lead: Enter the phone or email and password on file.

ordersLive.title: Current orders
ordersLive.sub: Orders shown here are returned by the server; each order has its own card.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.guest: Sign in to send your location to the server.
tracking.intro: While you are available (not offline), your location is sent automatically when the app is in the foreground. You do not use a separate tracking switch — set availability on the home screen. Background tracking may be added later.
tracking.subAvailabilityDriven: Go offline from home to stop sharing your location. Allow location access so the team can see you when you are available.
tracking.trackingOffCaption: Off — you are offline or not signed in
tracking.permissionCallout: To share your position when you are available, allow location access for this app.
tracking.appBackground: In background — sending paused for now
tracking.issuePermissionForeground: Allow location while using the app to continue tracking.
tracking.issueNetworkOffline: No connection — the point is saved to send when the network is back.
tracking.issuePermissionDeniedSettings: Location permission was not granted. You can enable it in app settings.

realtime.newOrderMessage: Order #{{serial}} is waiting for you to accept
realtime.newOrderMessageFallback: You have a new order waiting to be accepted
realtime.orderUpdatedMessage: One of your orders was updated
realtime.assignmentEndedMessage: You can wait for a new offer or refresh the list

overflow.titleOne: One additional order is not on the main card
overflow.titleMany: {{count}} additional orders are not on the main card
overflow.warningHint: There may be secondary orders not shown right now.
overflow.detailsHint: Open details from the list below or from the archive.

settings.title: Settings
settings.hubSub: Account, tools, and preferences outside live order execution.
settings.languageHint: English, Arabic, or Hebrew — saved on this device.
settings.hubAvailabilityHint: On, off — from the same account screen
settings.hubSignOutHint: At the bottom of the profile screen
settings.hubAppNotifHint: Coming soon — sound and visibility preferences
settings.hubQuickHomeHint: Status summary and latest alert — optional
